top_signals.title: Nintendo shares rebound as AI fatigue fuels Japan stock rotation
top_signals.summary: Nintendo shares climbed as much as 6.8% in Tokyo to mark a third straight day of gains — their longest winning streak since mid-March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
